title: Sorted Array To Balanced BST

starterCode.python:

class Solution:
    # @param A : tuple of integers
    # @return the root node in the tree
    def sortedArrayToBST(self, A):

hints: Use recursive approach to build the BST.
Always pick the middle element of the current subarray as the root.
This ensures the tree is balanced because both subtrees will have approximately equal sizes.
Recursively build left subtree from left half of array.
Recursively build right subtree from right half of array.
Base case: if low > high, return null. If low == high, return a node with that value.
